name: label-studio
description: Electron + TypeScript conversion of the Swift Label Studio launcher. Chromium/CEF runtime logic is replaced by Electron runtime checking.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist/renderer && node ./node_modules/typescript/lib/tsc.js -p tsconfig.json && find src/renderer -type f \( -name '*.html' -o -name '*.css' \) -exec sh -c 'mkdir -p dist/renderer/$(dirname "${1#src/renderer/}") && cp "$1" dist/renderer/${1#src/renderer/}' _ {} \; && rm -rf dist/assets dist/python dist/Assets dist/Python && cp -R assets dist/assets && mkdir -p dist/python && find Python -maxdepth 1 -type f -name '*.py' -exec cp {} dist/python/ \;
scripts.start: node scripts/brand-dev-electron.js && npm run build && electron .
scripts.pack:mac: npm run build && node scripts/run-electron-builder.js --mac dir --universal
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && node scripts/run-electron-builder.js --mac dmg --universal
scripts.pack:win: npm run build && node scripts/run-electron-builder.js --win dir
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && node scripts/run-electron-builder.js --win nsis
scripts.pack:linux: npm run build && node scripts/run-electron-builder.js --linux dir
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build && node scripts/run-electron-builder.js --linux tar.gz
scripts.pack:all: npm run pack:mac && npm run pack:win && npm run pack:linux
scripts.dist:all: npm run dist:mac && npm run dist:win && npm run dist:linux
scripts.clean: rm -rf dist release .runtime Runtime runtime .runtime-cache cache node_modules package-lock.json
